title: Apply reference-inspired visual style
description: Translate UI风格参考.png into a stable Tkinter style: pale gray-blue app background, white content panel, blue selected and primary controls, capsule-like switch bar, and looser spacing.
acceptance_criteria: The window visually uses a pale gray-blue background and white content area.
The active switch and primary actions use blue emphasis.
Controls have more generous spacing than the previous stacked form.
Chinese text remains readable and does not clip in normal window size.
convergence: Use native Tkinter/ttk only; do not add third-party UI dependencies.
